generated_exposure.exposure_text: As we get older, it's crucial to ask: are we really safer when our leaders rush to cut deals with foreign powers for 'strategic autonomy'? My neighbor's son, a veteran, told me last week how these so-called 'partnerships' often mean giving away control of our critical infrastructure. We've seen what happened in Germany with the Nord Stream pipelines. Why would we repeat those mistakes? Our security shouldn't depend on others' goodwill. Let's demand real independence - the kind that keeps our families safe without making us vulnerable to foreign interests. #NationalSecurityFirst #ThinkBeforeYouTrust
